hospital_faq: Our visiting hours are from 9 AM to 8 PM daily. For specific department timings, please contact our main desk at (555) 123-4567.
appointment: To book, change, or cancel an appointment, please call our scheduling department at (555) 123-4567 or use our online patient portal.
insurance: We accept a wide range of insurance plans. For questions about coverage or billing, please contact our billing department directly at (555) 123-4568.
other: For general inquiries, please contact our main help desk at (555) 123-4567. If this is a medical emergency, please visit the nearest emergency room.
